explanation: Item 19 reports AUV (Gross Sales) for 3,057 franchised Traditional Restaurants. The cohort consists of restaurants paying the standard 5% royalty rate. Item 6 confirms the standard royalty for new franchisees is also 5%. The incentive programs (Standard, Relocation, etc.) reduce royalty in early years, but the cohort includes restaurants with an average age of 28 years, meaning most are well past the incentive period and paying the standard 5% rate. No material cohort-comparability discrepancy exists between the FPR population and current new-franchisee economics.
note: Item 19 cohort comparability: no discrepancy found. Both cohort and current new franchisees pay 5% standard royalty.
